name: Gondola MCP
description: Free remote MCP server for hotel search and booking. AI agents search, compare, and book hotels across cash and loyalty points rates via Model Context Protocol.

skills.name: Hotel Search
skills.description: Search hotels by location, dates, and guest count across both cash and loyalty points rate options

skills.name: Rate Comparison
skills.description: Compare cash prices and points redemption rates side-by-side to identify the best value booking

skills.name: Hotel Booking
skills.description: Initiate hotel bookings for cash and points stays via MCP tool calls from any AI agent
